title: Kimbe Heat Wave
lead: Kimbe is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.69. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kimbe is characterized by high temperatures and humidity levels, with an average relative humidity of 83%. 
 The lack of wind, with an average speed of 1.7 km/h, exacerbates the heat, making it feel even more oppressive. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 11.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
